description: WrongDirectionFlow triggers on an outbound channel (Sev-1). HttpConsumerOneFlow and HttpConsumerTwoFlow share the same HTTP inbound channel as their trigger (Sev-2).

phase9Findings.expectedMessageFragment: trigger channel 'outboundQueue' has direction 'outbound', must be 'inbound'

notes: TRIGGER_CHANNEL_DIRECTION_INVALID is Sev-1 so verdict is BLOCKED. The HTTP-shared finding fires once per shared HTTP channel (not once per flow).
